The '''''Thalmussen''''' was a [[Transport/Legends|transport]] [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] used by the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. It had a [[Color/Legends|grey]] [[Hull/Legends|hull]] with two orange stripes across its center and was equipped with two [[Engine/Legends|engines]].<ref name="GB" /> Sometime between [[39 BBY/Legends|39 BBY]] and [[36 BBY/Legends|36 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places the [[Alaris Prime colonial war]] between [[39 BBY/Legends|39 BBY]] and [[36 BBY/Legends|36 BBY]].</ref> the ''Thalmussen'', alongside three other identical craft, were used to transport some of the first Wookiee [[Alaris Prime colonists|settlers]] to the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Alaris Prime/Legends|Alaris Prime]].<ref name="GB" />

The ship traveled alongside the other vessels through the [[Alaris Expanse]], an area of [[Realspace/Legends|space]], until they landed on the moon, in a clearing near a large body of [[Water/Legends|water]]. Most of the Wookiees on the transport ships stayed on board while the Wookiees [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], [[Shoran]] and [[Attichitcuk/Legends|Attichitcuk]] [[Scout/Legends|scouted]] ahead.<ref name="GB" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Thalmussen'' first appeared in the [[2001]] [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''. The ''Thalmussen''{{'s}} name is only given in the description of the Wookiee tutorial campaign, and it is also shown in the introduction to the first level of the campaign, named "Moving and Attacking". In the level itself four identical transport ships are shown but it is not made clear which one is the ''Thalmussen''.<ref name="GB" />
